summary: airkey-mfa-react preinstall beacons installer identity to oast.fun Interactsh collector
details: The package declares a preinstall script (node index.js) that auto-runs on npm install. index.js requires https and os, collects installer identifiers (os.userInfo().username, os.hostname(), os.platform(), Node version, CI flag) and POSTs them to a hardcoded Interactsh/oast.fun subdomain (https://eeazmrabqcquvqjfubjp6jkk2qq9p3acn.oast.fun/detox). The package name 'airkey-mfa-react' promises MFA/React functionality but the tarball ships no such code — the only install-time effect is the outbound beacon. Empty author/description and an inflated version (36.1.1) are consistent with a dependency-confusion recon publication targeting an internal 'airkey' package name.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
